title: Discreet Log Contracts (DLCs)
description: DLCs settle oracle-based outcomes using signature-based cryptographic tricks instead of on-chain scripting branches. They provide private, efficient contract settlement with clear oracle assumptions.

resources.notes: DLC framing within covenant-related contract use cases.
